validationMessages.className: notification alert m10top m20left m20right m10bottom

headings: Please select a new jurisdiction for the package.
Please enter in emails to be notified and select your email type.

Upload signed document for submission converts this package to an L2 package. Doing this will replace the rendered document you created with the ability to upload your fully executed document and electronically submit it to the jurisdiction. Click "ACCEPT" to continue.
